expected.notes: Owner is US citizen/PR filing 1040, which satisfies residency condition; rule requires owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr, so wrong_form_type must not fire.

probe_intent:
Generate a synthetic case where the engine must NOT fire rule 'wrong_form_type', but that structurally resembles a case that WOULD fire it. Produce a case where ONE of the rule's conditions is deliberately not satisfied while the others are. Rule conditions:
  - answers.owner_residency neq us_citizen_or_pr
  - extraction_b.form_type eq 1040
No real PII or real-looking government identifiers.
